sentences.target: Ce légume est vraiment frais aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: Ce légume est vraiment frais aujourd'hui.
translations.en: This vegetable is really fresh today.
translations.es: Esta verdura está realmente fresca hoy.
translations.de: Dieses Gemüse ist heute wirklich frisch.
translations.it: Questo ortaggio è davvero fresco oggi.
translations.zh-Hans: 这蔬菜今天真的很新鲜。
translations.yue: 呢樣蔬菜今日真係好新鮮。
translations.pt: Este legume está realmente fresco hoje.
translations.vi: Rau này hôm nay rất tươi.
translations.nl: Deze groente is vandaag echt vers.
translations.hu: Ez a zöldség ma tényleg friss.
translations.hi: यह सब्ज़ी आज वाकई ताज़ी है.
translations.pl: To warzywo jest dziś naprawdę świeże.
translations.el: Αυτό το λαχανικό είναι σήμερα πραγματικά φρέσκο.
translations.nb: Denne grønnsaken er virkelig fersk i dag.
translations.id: Sayur ini benar-benar segar hari ini.
translations.sv: Den här grönsaken är verkligen färsk idag.
translations.ro: Această legumă este cu adevărat proaspătă astăzi.
translations.cs: Tato zelenina je dnes opravdu čerstvá.
translations.da: Denne grøntsag er virkelig frisk i dag.
translations.fi: Tämä vihannes on tänään todella tuore.
translations.ja: この野菜は今日は本当に新鮮です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, deictic reference; modifies the noun 'légume' and forms the subject NP.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject NP referring to a vegetable.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective phrase.
Degree adverb; intensifies the adjective 'frais' within the predicate.
Adjective, masculine singular agreeing with 'légume'; predicate complement of the copula.
Temporal adverb; situates the statement in time by modifying the clause.

sentences.target: Tu veux un légume avec le dîner.
sentences.reading: /ty vø œ̃ le.ʒym avɛk lə dine/

translations.fr: Tu veux un légume avec le dîner.
translations.ipa: /ty vø œ̃ le.ʒym avɛk lə dine/
translations.en: Do you want a vegetable with dinner?
translations.es: Quieres una verdura con la cena.
translations.it: Vuoi un ortaggio con la cena.
translations.zh-Hans: 你晚餐想要一个蔬菜吗。
translations.yue: 你晚飯想要一種蔬菜嗎。
translations.pt: Você quer um legume com o jantar.
translations.he: אתה רוצה ירק עם ארוחת הערב.
translations.tr: Akşam yemeğinde bir sebze ister misin.
translations.vi: Bạn có muốn một loại rau với bữa tối.
translations.nl: Wil je een groente bij het avondeten.
translations.hi: क्या आप रात के खाने के साथ एक सब्ज़ी चाहेंगे.
translations.el: Θέλεις ένα λαχανικό με το δείπνο.
translations.nb: Vil du ha en grønnsak til middag.
translations.id: Kamu mau sayur dengan makan malam.
translations.sv: Vill du ha en grönsak till middag.
translations.da: Vil du have en grøntsag til aftensmad.
translations.ja: 夕食に野菜はどうですか。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular informal; clausal subject.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; takes a direct object ('un légume') and a PP ('avec le dîner').
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces a non-specific noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'veux'.
Preposition; introduces the prepositional phrase 'avec le dîner' indicating accompaniment/time context.
Definite article, masculine singular; marks 'dîner' as specific.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: On coupe le légume pour la soupe.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ kup lə le.ʒym puʁ la sup/

translations.fr: On coupe le légume pour la soupe.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ kup lə le.ʒym puʁ la sup/
translations.en: We are cutting the vegetable for the soup.
translations.es: Estamos cortando la verdura para la sopa.
translations.de: Wir schneiden das Gemüse für die Suppe.
translations.it: Stiamo tagliando l'ortaggio per la zuppa.
translations.ko: 우리는 수프에 넣을 채소를 썰고 있어요.
translations.pt: Estamos cortando o legume para a sopa.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang cắt rau cho món súp.
translations.nl: We snijden de groente voor de soep.
translations.hi: हम सूप के लिए सब्ज़ी काट रहे हैं.
translations.el: Κόβουμε το λαχανικό για τη σούπα.
translations.id: Kami sedang memotong sayur untuk sup.
translations.ja: スープ用に野菜を切っています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/pseudo-subject pronoun, grammatically 3rd person singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular (agreeing with 'on'); transitive, governs 'le légume' as direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; specifies the noun 'légume'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'coupe'.
Preposition; introduces a purpose PP ('pour la soupe').
Definite article, feminine singular; marks 'soupe' as specific.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Ils plantent ce légume au printemps.

translations.fr: Ils plantent ce légume au printemps.
translations.en: They plant this vegetable in spring.
translations.de: Sie pflanzen dieses Gemüse im Frühling.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在春天种这种蔬菜。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺春天種呢種蔬菜。
translations.pt: Eles plantam este legume na primavera.
translations.he: הם שותלים את הירק הזה באביב.
translations.vi: Họ trồng loại rau này vào mùa xuân.
translations.ar: هم يزرعون هذا الخضار في الربيع.
translations.nl: Ze planten deze groente in de lente.
translations.hi: वे इस सब्ज़ी को वसंत में लगाते हैं.
translations.el: Φυτεύουν αυτό το λαχανικό την άνοιξη.
translations.nb: De planter denne grønnsaken om våren.
translations.id: Mereka menanam sayur ini pada musim semi.
translations.sv: De planterar denna grönsak på våren.
translations.da: De planter denne grøntsag om foråret.
translations.ja: 彼らは春にこの野菜を植えます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine/mixed); clausal subject.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; transitive, takes 'ce légume' as direct object.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; deictic modifier of 'légume'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'plantent'.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; preposition fused with definite article; introduces the temporal PP 'au printemps' meaning 'in spring'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'au'; denotes the season/time frame.
